title: adonis aestivalis subsp. microcarpa
intro: Adonis aestivalis subsp. microcarpa, also known as the lesser Adonis or small Adonis, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Adonis. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Adonis aestivalis subsp. microcarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese and Ayurvedic medicine.
